headline: Costco and Walmart Deserve Their Rich Valuations, This Analyst Says
summary: John San Marco, senior research analyst at Neuberger Berman, also likes Home Depot and Ulta Beauty. Which discounter has been unfairly snubbed by investors?

raw.headline: Costco and Walmart Deserve Their Rich Valuations, This Analyst Says

headline: Clinch Bolsters North American Growth with Appointment of IPG Veteran Melvin Stern as VP
summary: Clinch, the agentic AI platform for omnichannel content orchestration, today announced the appointment of Melvin Stern as Vice President of Growth, strengthening its North American team as brands and agencies seek more integrated ways to connect creative to media.

raw.headline: Clinch Bolsters North American Growth with Appointment of IPG Veteran Melvin Stern as VP

headline: As millions lose weight on GLP-1s, they're starting to turn to retailers to refresh their wardrobes
summary: Apparel retailers could see an up to $13 billion annual boost in spending because of GLP-1 drugs, according to an estimate by equity research firm Bernstein.

raw.headline: As millions lose weight on GLP-1s, they're starting to turn to retailers to refresh their wardrobes

headline: Ulta makes big change customers will notice right away
summary: Once upon a time, beauty shopping was done in person. Customers flocked to major department stores like Macy’s and Saks, where a shopgirl could assist them in finding the perfect lipstick shade or recommend the best skin care products for their skin type. But those days are long gone. Online beauty ...
